data.text: P04/05 FELISIAN WITH NO WATER SHORTAGE. LANDING 194.34 IN GRASSY AREA
WITH SHRIBS AND SMALL TREES ON DOWNHILL ROLLING GROUND; OBJECT SIGHTED
DURING DESCENT WAS NOT FOUND ON FIRST TRIP, ON SECOND IT PROVED TO BE
ONLY A PIT. 294.100 WAS BROWNISH GRASSES AND THE SAME SHRUBS AND SMALL
TREES, BU A COUPLE OF HOPPERS ALSO. 129.14 WAS BROWN GRASSLAND AGAIN
WITH A MAGNIFICENT DISPLAY OF LITHIC MESAS AND PINNACLES EXTENDING FROM
